coverNote: I've been developing my UKG and garage selections for the past year and feel this opening slot would be the perfect fit for where I'm at musically. I've included a recent mix that shows the direction I'd take.
Long-time admirer of NightShift's programming — I think my garage and house selections would be a great warm-up fit for the Vol. 13 lineup.
Jungle and 140 is my home turf. I'd love to bring my peak time selections to NightShift Vol. 13 — very familiar with The Substation and it's a room I love playing.
4-hour techno sets are my bread and butter. Happy to discuss set direction with Basin Nights in advance.
Sound Garden's new talent focus is exactly what I'm looking for. Christchurch-based, I'd love the chance to play closer to home.
